name: Emerald Learning Centre
desc: Emerald Learning Centre is a modern academic tutorship program that prioritizes academic excellence and top-tier educational supremacy. The logo and brand identity design seeks to communicate their deepest brand value — the establishment of a trustworthy and solid academic foundation for children from 3 to 16 years. They achieve this through properly-formulated and implemented tutorship programs, ensuring their students always stand out.

The logo and brand identity design seeks to communicate their deepest brand value — the establishment of a trustworthy and solid academic foundation for children from 3 to 16 years. They achieve this through properly-formulated and implemented tutorship programs, ensuring their students always stand out.
